extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series shows its largest spike very early (within the first ~15% of time), then mostly stays in a moderate band (roughly between 0.2 and 0.6) without any deep, long-lasting dip near the end.  
R2: In the last third of the series, values remain relatively stable and moderate (typically between about 0.35 and 0.6), without a sharp, isolated low point.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins high (around 0.6–0.75) and then drops steadily to a clear low valley in the first quarter of the time (down near 0.1–0.2) before recovering.  
R2: In the last third of the series, there is a pronounced “V”-shaped dip (often approaching 0–0.2) followed by a rebound back to moderate or high values (around 0.4–0.6).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Contains at least one very low dip (value near 0–0.1) around the middle or later part of the series, but the signal quickly returns to a moderate level (around 0.3–0.6).  
R2: After this deep dip, the series shows another clear rise to a moderate or high peak (above about 0.5) rather than staying low.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Starts relatively high (around 0.6–0.7) and then drops steadily to a distinct low (near 0.1–0.2) early in the series.  
R2: Following this early drop, the series never again reaches a strong, sharp high peak; instead it oscillates within a moderate band (roughly 0.3–0.6) with no sustained spikes above about 0.7.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 15–20% of the time series, there is a pronounced spike that reaches close to the global maximum, followed quickly by a sharp drop toward a local minimum.
R2: After this early spike-and-drop, the series fluctuates around a mid-level (roughly the middle of the value range) without any long, smooth monotonic descent.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins near a high value and then shows a predominantly smooth, gradual decrease over roughly the first 20–30% of the time axis (no strong early spike followed by an immediate deep trough).
R2: In the central region (about 30–60% of the time axis), there is at least one extended dip that reaches a clear low point, followed by a relatively smooth recovery back toward mid or high values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Has a very sharp spike up to a high value (near the top of the range) within the first 10–15% of the series, followed by a rapid drop.
R2: After this early spike-and-drop, the rest of the series oscillates in a mid-range band without any long, smooth downward trend from start to end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Starts at a high value and then shows a relatively smooth, extended downward trend over the first 15–25% of the series (clear overall decrease rather than just a brief dip).
R2: After this initial downward segment, the series remains mostly in the middle range, without any prominent early spike that clearly stands out above all later values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The early part of the series (first quarter of the time) has at least one sharp upward spike that clearly stands out above its neighboring values, followed by a noticeable drop.
R2: The middle-to-late part of the series (last half of the time) remains moderately variable but without any long, deep downward drift; values tend to oscillate around a mid‑range level instead of steadily decreasing.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The early part of the series (first quarter of the time) starts relatively high and then shows a clear overall downward trend, reaching a noticeably lower level than at the start.
R2: In the later part of the series (last half of the time) the signal recovers from a pronounced low point with a clear upward movement, ending at a higher level than the preceding minimum.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series has its highest peak within the first 15% of the time (strong early spike), followed by a clear drop.
R2: After that early peak-and-drop, values fluctuate in a mid-range band (roughly 0.2–0.6) without any long, smooth downward trend from start to finish.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts relatively high and then shows a pronounced overall fall during the first third of the time (clear early downward trend).
R2: After this initial fall, it does not stay low: it rises again to mid/high values (around or above 0.5) in the middle or later part of the series.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, there is an early sharp spike that reaches near the global maximum, followed by a rapid drop to one of the lowest values in the whole series.  
R2: After this initial spike-and-drop, the rest of the series stays in a mid-range band (roughly between 0.3 and 0.6) with several moderate oscillations, but without another equally sharp deep valley near the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts relatively high and then quickly decays to a low plateau (first 15–25% of the series), staying near its minimum for a short interval before rising again.  
R2: In the last third of the series there is a pronounced deep valley (one of the lowest points of the whole sequence), followed by a clear recovery back to mid or high values before the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, there is an early, sharp peak reaching close to the global maximum, followed by a rapid drop to near the global minimum.  
R2: After this early spike-and-drop, the rest of the series fluctuates around a mid‑level (roughly 0.3–0.6) without any long plateau at very low values.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts high and then decreases smoothly over the first 10–20% of the time, without an early isolated spike followed by an immediate deep minimum.  
R2: In the middle part (about 30–70% of the length), there is a pronounced deep valley—values drop close to the minimum and then recover—forming a clear “U‑shaped” segment.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The time series has a pronounced positive spike (local maximum above 0.8) occurring in the first half of the series (roughly between 0–35% of its length).  
R2: After the middle of the series, values stay mostly in a moderate band (about 0.3–0.6) without a long, sharp drop close to 0.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The time series starts high (above about 0.6) and then exhibits a long, steep decline toward low values (near 0.1–0.2) within the first third of the series.  
R2: In the second half, there is at least one deep downward excursion where values fall close to 0 (below about 0.1–0.15) after being at moderate or high levels.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series begins with a relatively low peak (around 0.6–0.7) followed by an early sharp drop to a local minimum near 0.1–0.2 within the first 15 time steps.  
R2: After this early drop, the series oscillates around a mid-level band (roughly 0.3–0.6) without any long, deep valley staying near zero for more than a short segment.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts high (around 0.7 or above) and then shows a more gradual, extended decline into a low region (near 0.1–0.2), rather than an immediate sharp spike-and-drop.  
R2: In the later part of the series (after about the first third of the length), there is a pronounced deep valley close to 0 (or a very low value) followed by a strong rebound toward mid-to-high values (around 0.4–0.7).
